lines.speaker: Pilgrim Elder
lines.text: The road into Jerusalem has been long, and many families are still arriving.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What would help them most before they enter the courts?

lines.speaker: Pilgrim Elder
lines.text: A skin of water by the gate would be a kindness to those who are weary.

choices.text: I will make room for the tired ones first.

lines.speaker: Temple Teacher
lines.text: The child listens with care, and His questions have made the elders pause.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Then I should listen before I speak.

lines.speaker: Temple Teacher
lines.text: That is the beginning of wisdom in the house of prayer.

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: We searched with sorrow, and now we have found Him here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: His words seem simple, but they are weighty.

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: Some things must be treasured in the heart until God makes them plain.
